mnemonics: Bob HUGHES Helps Us Generate Excellent Software (for Tata McGraw Hill, Module 5)
keyPoints: The topic covers Software Engineering & Project Management principles from a standard textbook.
It is a part of the 5th-semester curriculum, representing a 10-hour module.
The specific reference is to authors like Bob Hughes, likely from a Tata McGraw Hill publication.
commonMistakes: Confusing this module with other semesters or authors, as many textbooks exist on the subject.
Overlooking the project management aspect and focusing only on pure software engineering.
Not allocating the full 10 hours of study time, underestimating the module's depth.
